label: 第158話
source_locator: 単行本18巻 目次 p.107
summary_short: 秤と綺羅羅は死滅回游への協力を承諾する。虎杖たちは役割分担を決め、得点移動の規則を追加するため各結界へ入る準備を整える。
summary_full: 秤は五条の封印と夜蛾の死を知り、将来の呪術規定改定に協力するという取引を条件に死滅回游への参加を承諾する。直後、コガネが鹿紫雲一によって総則9「泳者の情報を参照できる」が追加されたと告知する。鹿紫雲は200点を持ち宿儺を探しており、日車寛見も100点を超えていた。虎杖が結界へ入る前から泳者として登録されていることも判明する。一行は、まず得点譲渡の総則を追加し、次に代理の泳者を立てて離脱できる規則を目指し、二人の高得点者を追う。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: 悠仁 and 恵 succeed in getting 秤 and 綺羅羅 to hear them out. 秤 is surprised by what occurred in 渋谷 and agrees to help, but only on the condition that they return the favor in the future. With strong new allies added to their party, 悠仁 and 恵 form a plan of action to enter the 死滅回游.
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: 秤 surprised to learn 恵 is head of the 禪院 clan. 秤 finally sits down and listens to what 悠仁 and 恵 have to say. He's completely surprised to hear that 五条悟 was actually sealed. パンダ adds that 夜蛾正道 died in a fight with a higher-up after 渋谷, surprising everyone. 悠仁 and 恵 are concerned for their senpai since 夜蛾 was essentially his father, but パンダ says it's okay. 秤 expresses that he's bummed out now that everyone who's ever taken care of him is out of the picture. Apparently, he hasn't been this sad since someone named Yakul was shot in the butt with an arrow. コガネ suddenly announces a new rule has been added to the 死滅回游. 秤 agrees to help combat the 死滅回游, which gives 恵 a small sense of relief and makes the others smile. However, 秤 tells them not to get the wrong idea and makes it a point that everyone understands this is a deal and they must return the favor in the future. パンダ knows 秤 wants revisions to jujutsu regulations and asks what to know exactly what he desires. 恵 comments that he doesn't think whatever it is will be difficult, annoying 秤 since he was the one who was being asked. 秤 calls 恵 "sea urchin head" and asks what he could possibly know, promoting 恵 to reveal that he's head of the 禪院 clan . Shocked, 秤 finds this even more of a surprise than the news about 五条 and 夜蛾. He believes that with the backing of the 御三家 , making revisions to regulations will be easy. The hard part of keeping the 禪院 clan from taking control of the fight club would come afterward. In order to get ahead of this potential issue, 秤 puts on a friendly expression and asks 恵 to be buds. Unbeknownst to both of them, 真希 annihilates the 禪院 clan the next day. 死滅回游 player, 鹿紫雲一 scores 200 points. With everyone in agreement, 悠仁 states they need to decide who's going to what colony when suddenly コガネ appears above 悠仁 and makes a loud ringing noise. コガネ announces that a player has added a new rule to the game, allowing players to have access to information on other players. This information includes their name, number of points, number of rules added, and their current colony. This rule was added by 鹿紫雲一 , an elite player dominating 東京第2結界. Hajime finds all the current players they've encountered to be weaklings compared to those they fought four hundred years ago, and they wonder where 宿儺 is. 恵 searches for players with 100 points who can be persuaded to add rules to the game. After making the announcement, コガネ introduces itself to 悠仁. It has a different voice than the announcement because now it's acting as the liaison for the 死滅回游 assigned to 悠仁. 恵 doesn't understand why 悠仁 is already being considered a player before entering a barrier colony. 悠仁 believes it has something to do with 宿儺 and theorizes perhaps that's how 宿儺 became a 呪物 . 恵 points out that's still strange because 悠仁 ingested 宿儺の指 of his own will, unlike other past sorcerers who were in contracts with 羂索 . " We'll target 鹿紫雲一 and 日車寛見... and hunt them down . " 悠仁 has コガネ show him his own player info and 恵 uses the list to find 鹿紫雲's name, identifying them as the one who added the rule. 恵 believes they can get through the 死滅回游 without killing anyone by forcing someone with enough points to add a rule. The two players that fit the bill are 鹿紫雲一 and 日車寛見 . In order to save 津美紀 , the first rule they add needs to offset rule 8, which details 術式 removal after 19 days of inactivity. 恵 states they can do so by adding a rule that allows players to transfer points between each other. After adding that rule, 恵 suggests adding another one that allows players to spend points to remove themselves from the game entirely. 秤 points out that might conflict with the long-lasting rules on the game but 恵 figures maybe it'll work if a non-player substitutes them. It's ultimately up to the gamemaster but regardless, the team now has a plan of action. As they look for the 天使 to undo the seal on 獄門疆 , they will target 鹿紫雲一 and 日車寛見, and hunt them down!
candidate_evidence.characters_raw_text: 秤金次 虎杖悠仁 伏黒恵 パンダ 星綺羅羅 鹿紫雲一 羂索 (回想) 宿儺 (想像) 日車寛見
candidate_evidence.locations_raw_text: ガチンコファイトクラブ／東京第2結界

key_events_verified_phase8: 秤と綺羅羅が死滅回游への協力を承諾する
鹿紫雲が泳者情報参照の総則を追加する
鹿紫雲と日車が100点以上を持つと判明する
虎杖が結界侵入前から泳者登録されていると判明する
得点譲渡と離脱の規則追加を目標にする
verification_notes_phase8: 集英社公式16～18巻目次と巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別記事、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した第八段階。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
